notes: The render-risk payoff milestone. The strategy pivoted once (TOK-01 apps/web re-skin -> TOK-02 run the real apps/hiring) when iter-05 attribution resolved the render wall to a product-boundary eject, not a render-gate. Gate met on the faithful platform-native 20/page pagination (GATE-DECISION D1). Independent orchestrator re-verify caught a probe render-race (R5) the 3-cold-run had passed - the D17 'only an executable probe binds' keeper, applied. Zero platform-repo edits throughout; code in the rext authoring clone (tag casting-call-m224-harden), docs in rosetta.
